title: Have a good laugh
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - \"There is nothing like a good dose of humour. It's important to laugh, especially as there is so much in the world that is so serious and scary these days.\"","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - \"There is nothing like a good dose of humour. It's important to laugh, especially as there is so much in the world that is so serious and scary these days.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"So says Mossel Bay local Ntembeko Monde, also known as Moola Moola, who is putting on a Comedy Night at the Diaz Hotel on Saturday, 5 April.","html":"So says Mossel Bay local Ntembeko Monde, also known as Moola Moola, who is putting on a Comedy Night at the Diaz Hotel on Saturday, 5 April."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Monde put on a show in July 2023 in Mossel Bay.","html":"Monde put on a show in July 2023 in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He says: \"We filled up the Bravo Lounge at the Garden Route Casino and we got good reviews, so we hope to fill up this venue too.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The show is called Finally. Monde explains why.","html":"The show is called Finally. Monde explains why."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I'd been engaged for six years and at the 2023 show everyone asked me when I was getting married.\" He was \"ragged\" about this long engagement a lot, he admits with a chuckle.","html":"\"I'd been engaged for six years and at the 2023 show everyone asked me when I was getting married.\" He was \"ragged\" about this long engagement a lot, he admits with a chuckle."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Married"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He decided to call this coming show Finally, because he is now a married man and many people have said to him, \"Finally you're married.\"","html":"He decided to call this coming show Finally, because he is now a married man and many people have said to him, \"Finally you're married.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is bringing three other comedians to town to join him in the show:","html":"He is bringing three other comedians to town to join him in the show:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Liyabona Nqaba, known as Liyanqaba, based in Gqeberha, is the star of the show, Sugar Mama, on YouTube.Lukhanyo Maphempeni, also from Gqeberha, also acts on Sugar Mama.","html":"Liyabona Nqaba, known as Liyanqaba, based in Gqeberha, is the star of the show, Sugar Mama, on YouTube.
Lukhanyo Maphempeni, also from Gqeberha, also acts on Sugar Mama."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vusi \"Oulik\" Sono, from Komani (previously Queenstown), is well known for his characterisations on social media.","html":"Vusi \"Oulik\" Sono, from Komani (previously Queenstown), is well known for his characterisations on social media."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The perpetually drunk and hiccupping woman, Palesa, is his most famous character, but he does other impersonations of people of all ages and cultures, attracting millions of views.","html":"The perpetually drunk and hiccupping woman, Palesa, is his most famous character, but he does other impersonations of people of all ages and cultures, attracting millions of views."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Time slot"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The doors open at 18:00 on 5 April. Each stand-up comedian will have a time slot.","html":"The doors open at 18:00 on 5 April. Each stand-up comedian will have a time slot."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"No under 18s will be allowed at the show, Moola notes. The show will be about relationships, community issues, crime and politics, among other topics.","html":"No under 18s will be allowed at the show, Moola notes. The show will be about relationships, community issues, crime and politics, among other topics."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For tickets, call 073 694 3166. Pre-bought tickets cost R150 and tickets at the door, R170.","html":"For tickets, call 073 694 3166. Pre-bought tickets cost R150 and tickets at the door, R170."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ntembeko Monde, who goes by the name, \"Moola Moola\".","html":"Ntembeko Monde, who goes by the name, \"Moola Moola\". "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Liyanqaba\", whose real name is Liyabona Nqaba.","html":"\"Liyanqaba\", whose real name is Liyabona Nqaba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lukhanyo Maphempeni","html":"Lukhanyo Maphempeni "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
